---
title: "Registration"
---

## Registration process

Registration to the AIML4OS funathon is compulsory. The registration process takes place in two steps:

- First, participants register following the registration link;
- Second, organizers will send an email to participants confirming your registration (around May 10th).

## How to register

We stronly encourage participants to register in teams of approximately 3 to 5 people (but participants may register individually if they really want to). We also recommend that you form a team with your colleagues and __book a room where you can all work together in-person__ for the duration of the funathon.

The registration form is [[here](https://grist.numerique.gouv.fr/o/docs/forms/kVB8TszNTEbuuPoquY8ze8/55)]{style="font-size: 2em; color: blue;"}.
